title: Tweaked overlay
description: Tweaked Minecraft with Low Fire, Tiny Totem, Better Glint & Side Shield.
body:
A clean PvP-focused Minecraft texture pack that tweaks several visuals for a smoother and less distracting gameplay experience.
This pack features a smaller side shield for better screen visibility, a stronger and more vibrant enchantment glint, and a smaller Totem of Undying to keep your view clear during fights.
It also includes tweaked no-explosion visuals, reducing visual clutter and making combat feel cleaner and more optimized. Perfect for PvP players who want a minimal and polished look.
